words.exampleArabic: هَذَا الْمَفْهُومُ صَعْبٌ عَلَى الطُّلَّابِ الْمُبْتَدِئِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Ovaj pojam je težak za početnike.
words.exampleEn: This concept is difficult for beginner students.

words.exampleArabic: يَلْتَزِمُ الْمُوَظَّفُ بِمَبَادِئِ الشَّرَكَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Zaposlenik se pridržava načela kompanije.
words.exampleEn: The employee adheres to the company's principles.

words.exampleArabic: مَا رَأْيُكَ فِي هَذِهِ الْقَضِيَّةِ؟
words.exampleBs: Kakvo je tvoje mišljenje o ovom pitanju?
words.exampleEn: What is your opinion on this issue?

words.exampleArabic: الْوَضْعُ الِاقْتِصَادِيُّ يَتَحَسَّنُ تَدْرِيجِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Ekonomska situacija se postepeno poboljšava.
words.exampleEn: The economic situation is improving gradually.

words.exampleArabic: جَاءَتِ النَّتِيجَةُ أَفْضَلَ مِمَّا تَوَقَّعْنَا.
words.exampleBs: Rezultat je bio bolji nego što smo očekivali.
words.exampleEn: The result was better than we expected.

words.exampleArabic: مَا سَبَبُ غِيَابِكَ عَنِ الِاجْتِمَاعِ؟
words.exampleBs: Koji je razlog tvog odsustva s sastanka?
words.exampleEn: What is the reason for your absence from the meeting?

words.exampleArabic: لِتَعَلُّمِ اللُّغَاتِ فَوَائِدُ كَثِيرَةٌ.
words.exampleBs: Učenje jezika ima mnogo prednosti.
words.exampleEn: Learning languages has many benefits.

words.exampleArabic: يُوَاجِهُ الشَّبَابُ تَحَدِّيَاتٍ كَثِيرَةً فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Mladi se suočavaju s mnogo izazova na tržištu rada.
words.exampleEn: Young people face many challenges in the job market.

words.exampleArabic: لَا تُفَوِّتْ هَذِهِ الْفُرْصَةَ الذَّهَبِيَّةَ.
words.exampleBs: Ne propusti ovu zlatnu priliku.
words.exampleEn: Do not miss this golden opportunity.

words.exampleArabic: تَقَعُ عَلَيْهِ مَسْؤُولِيَّةٌ كَبِيرَةٌ فِي هَذَا الْمَنْصِبِ.
words.exampleBs: Na njemu leži velika odgovornost na ovoj poziciji.
words.exampleEn: A great responsibility rests on him in this position.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَبِرُ كَثِيرٌ مِنَ الْخُبَرَاءِ هَذَا الْقَرَارَ صَائِبًا.
words.exampleBs: Mnogi stručnjaci smatraju ovu odluku ispravnom.
words.exampleEn: Many experts consider this decision correct.

words.exampleArabic: يَقْتَرِحُ الْمُدِيرُ تَغْيِيرَ الْخُطَّةِ الْحَالِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Direktor predlaže promjenu trenutnog plana.
words.exampleEn: The director suggests changing the current plan.

words.exampleArabic: يُثْبِتُ الْبَحْثُ صِحَّةَ هَذِهِ النَّظَرِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživanje dokazuje ispravnost ove teorije.
words.exampleEn: The research proves the validity of this theory.

words.exampleArabic: يُؤَثِّرُ الضَّغْطُ النَّفْسِيُّ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْإِنْسَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Psihički pritisak utječe na zdravlje čovjeka.
words.exampleEn: Psychological stress affects human health.

words.exampleArabic: يُحَقِّقُ الْفَرِيقُ نَجَاحَاتٍ مُتَتَالِيَةً.
words.exampleBs: Tim postiže uzastopne uspjehe.
words.exampleEn: The team achieves successive successes.

words.exampleArabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَةُ الْمَشَارِيعَ الصَّغِيرَةَ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada podupire mala poduzeća.
words.exampleEn: The government supports small projects.

words.exampleArabic: يُعَارِضُ بَعْضُ الْأَعْضَاءِ هَذَا الْمُقْتَرَحَ.
words.exampleBs: Neki članovi se protive ovom prijedlogu.
words.exampleEn: Some members oppose this proposal.

words.exampleArabic: يُحَلِّلُ الْبَاحِثُ الْبَيَانَاتِ بِدِقَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživač pažljivo analizira podatke.
words.exampleEn: The researcher analyzes the data carefully.

words.exampleArabic: يُقَارِنُ الطَّالِبُ بَيْنَ الثَّقَافَتَيْنِ.
words.exampleBs: Student poredi dvije kulture.
words.exampleEn: The student compares the two cultures.

words.exampleArabic: تُطَوِّرُ الشَّرَكَةُ مُنْتَجَاتِهَا بِاسْتِمْرَارٍ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija stalno razvija svoje proizvode.
words.exampleEn: The company continuously develops its products.

words.exampleArabic: تُنْتِجُ هَذِهِ الْمَصْنَعُ آلَافَ الْوَحَدَاتِ يَوْمِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Ova fabrika proizvodi hiljade jedinica dnevno.
words.exampleEn: This factory produces thousands of units daily.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَلْزِمُ النَّجَاحُ الْعَمَلَ الدَّؤُوبَ.
words.exampleBs: Uspjeh zahtijeva marljiv rad.
words.exampleEn: Success requires diligent work.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَضَمَّنُ التَّقْرِيرُ مَعْلُومَاتٍ تَفْصِيلِيَّةً.
words.exampleBs: Izvještaj uključuje detaljne informacije.
words.exampleEn: The report includes detailed information.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَجَاوَزُ عَدَدُ الزُّوَّارِ الْمِلْيُونَ سَنَوِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Broj posjetilaca premašuje milion godišnje.
words.exampleEn: The number of visitors exceeds a million annually.

words.exampleArabic: هَذَا الِاجْتِمَاعُ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا لِلشَّرَكَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ovaj sastanak je veoma važan za kompaniju.
words.exampleEn: This meeting is very important for the company.

words.exampleArabic: الصَّبْرُ ضَرُورِيٌّ فِي تَعَلُّمِ اللُّغَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Strpljenje je neophodno pri učenju jezika.
words.exampleEn: Patience is necessary in language learning.

words.exampleArabic: هَلْ مِنَ الْمُمْكِنِ إِنْجَازُ الْمَشْرُوعِ هَذَا الْأُسْبُوعَ؟
words.exampleBs: Je li moguće završiti projekt ovog tjedna?
words.exampleEn: Is it possible to complete the project this week?

words.exampleArabic: تَعْكِسُ الثَّقَافَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ تَارِيخًا مُتَنَوِّعًا وَغَنِيًّا.
words.exampleBs: Arapska kultura odražava raznovrsnu i bogatu historiju.
words.exampleEn: Arab culture reflects a diverse and rich history.

words.exampleArabic: هَذَا الرَّأْيُ شَائِعٌ فِي الرَّأْيِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Ovo mišljenje je rašireno u javnom mnijenju.
words.exampleEn: This opinion is widespread in public opinion.

words.exampleArabic: لِكُلِّ مَشْرُوعٍ مُتَطَلَّبَاتٌ خَاصَّةٌ.
words.exampleBs: Svaki projekt ima posebne zahtjeve.
words.exampleEn: Every project has specific requirements.

words.exampleArabic: هَذَا الْأُسْلُوبُ فَعَّالٌ فِي تَعْلِيمِ الْأَطْفَالِ.
words.exampleBs: Ova metoda je efikasna u poučavanju djece.
words.exampleEn: This method is effective in teaching children.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ تَأْثِيرُ الْبَرْنَامَجِ إِيجَابِيًّا عَلَى الطُّلَّابِ.
words.exampleBs: Utjecaj programa na studente bio je pozitivan.
words.exampleEn: The program's effect on students was positive.

words.exampleArabic: لِلتَّكْنُولُوجِيَا آثَارٌ سَلْبِيَّةٌ إِذَا أُسِيءَ اسْتِخْدَامُهَا.
words.exampleBs: Tehnologija ima negativne učinke ako se njome zloupotrijebi.
words.exampleEn: Technology has negative effects if misused.

words.exampleArabic: الْقَضَايَا السِّيَاسِيَّةُ غَالِبًا مَا تَكُونُ مُعَقَّدَةً.
words.exampleBs: Politička pitanja su često složena.
words.exampleEn: Political issues are often complex.

words.exampleArabic: نَجَحَ بِالرَّغْمِ مِنَ الصُّعُوبَاتِ الْكَثِيرَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Uspio je uprkos mnogim teškoćama.
words.exampleEn: He succeeded despite the many difficulties.

words.bs: što se tiče, u vezi s
words.exampleArabic: فِيمَا يَتَعَلَّقُ بِالتَّعْلِيمِ، تَحْتَاجُ الدَّوْلَةُ إِلَى إِصْلَاحَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Što se tiče obrazovanja, država treba reforme.
words.exampleEn: Regarding education, the state needs reforms.

words.exampleArabic: كَانَ الطَّقْسُ بَارِدًا؛ وَعَلَى الرَّغْمِ مِنْ ذَلِكَ، خَرَجْنَا لِلنُّزْهَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Bilo je hladno; unatoč tome, izašli smo u šetnju.
words.exampleEn: The weather was cold; despite that, we went for a walk.

words.exampleArabic: الْعَمَلُ مُجْهِدٌ، وَمِنْ نَاحِيَةٍ أُخْرَى، يُوَفِّرُ دَخْلًا جَيِّدًا.
words.exampleBs: Posao je naporan, s druge strane, pruža dobar prihod.
words.exampleEn: The work is exhausting; on the other hand, it provides a good income.

words.exampleArabic: فِي الْوَاقِعِ، الْأَمْرُ أَبْسَطُ مِمَّا يَبْدُو.
words.exampleBs: Zapravo, stvar je jednostavnija nego što izgleda.
words.exampleEn: In fact, the matter is simpler than it appears.

words.exampleArabic: بِعِبَارَةٍ أُخْرَى، نَحْتَاجُ إِلَى مَزِيدٍ مِنَ الْوَقْتِ.
words.exampleBs: Drugim riječima, trebamo više vremena.
words.exampleEn: In other words, we need more time.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَّبِعُ الشَّبَابُ الِاتِّجَاهَاتِ الْحَدِيثَةَ فِي الْمَلْبَسِ.
words.exampleBs: Mladi prate moderne trendove u odijevanju.
words.exampleEn: Young people follow modern trends in clothing.

words.exampleArabic: الْهِجْرَةُ ظَاهِرَةٌ اجْتِمَاعِيَّةٌ قَدِيمَةٌ.
words.exampleBs: Migracija je stara društvena pojava.
words.exampleEn: Migration is an old social phenomenon.

words.exampleArabic: لَهُ أَثَرٌ كَبِيرٌ فِي تَطَوُّرِ الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Ima velik utjecaj na razvoj arapske književnosti.
words.exampleEn: He has a great impact on the development of Arabic literature.

words.exampleArabic: تَحْتَرِمُ الْأُسْرَةُ الْقِيَمَ الدِّينِيَّةَ وَالتَّقَالِيدَ.
words.exampleBs: Porodica poštuje vjerske vrijednosti i tradicije.
words.exampleEn: The family respects religious values and traditions.

words.exampleArabic: وَضَعَ لِنَفْسِهِ أَهْدَافًا وَاضِحَةً لِلْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
words.exampleBs: Postavio je sebi jasne ciljeve za budućnost.
words.exampleEn: He set clear goals for himself for the future.

words.exampleArabic: نَحْنُ فِي مَرْحَلَةٍ حَاسِمَةٍ مِنَ الْمَشْرُوعِ.
words.exampleBs: Nalazimo se u odlučujućoj fazi projekta.
words.exampleEn: We are in a decisive stage of the project.

words.exampleArabic: يَتَّبِعُ الْمُعَلِّمُ أُسْلُوبًا تَفَاعُلِيًّا فِي التَّدْرِيسِ.
words.exampleBs: Nastavnik primjenjuje interaktivan pristup u poučavanju.
words.exampleEn: The teacher follows an interactive approach in teaching.

words.exampleArabic: أَثَارَ الِاقْتِرَاحُ نِقَاشًا وَاسِعًا فِي الْبَرْلِمَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Prijedlog je izazvao širu raspravu u parlamentu.
words.exampleEn: The proposal sparked a wide debate in parliament.

words.exampleArabic: تَلْتَزِمُ الشَّرَكَةُ بِمَعَايِيرِ الْجَوْدَةِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija se pridržava međunarodnih standarda kvalitete.
words.exampleEn: The company adheres to international quality standards.

words.exampleArabic: بِوَجْهٍ عَامٍّ، الْأَوْضَاعُ مُسْتَقِرَّةٌ فِي الْمَنْطِقَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Općenito govoreći, prilike u regiji su stabilne.
words.exampleEn: Generally speaking, the situation is stable in the region.

words.exampleArabic: يَسْتَنْتِجُ الْعُلَمَاءُ مِنَ الْبَيَانَاتِ نَتَائِجَ مُثِيرَةً.
words.exampleBs: Naučnici iz podataka izvode zanimljive zaključke.
words.exampleEn: Scientists draw interesting conclusions from the data.

words.exampleArabic: يُلَخِّصُ الطَّالِبُ الدَّرْسَ فِي نُقَاطٍ وَاضِحَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Student sažima lekciju u jasnim tačkama.
words.exampleEn: The student summarizes the lesson in clear points.

words.exampleArabic: يُوَضِّحُ الْأُسْتَاذُ الْمَفَاهِيمَ الصَّعْبَةَ بِأَمْثِلَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Profesor pojašnjava teške pojmove primjerima.
words.exampleEn: The professor clarifies difficult concepts with examples.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْتَمِدُ نَجَاحُ الْمَشْرُوعِ عَلَى التَّخْطِيطِ الْجَيِّدِ.
words.exampleBs: Uspjeh projekta ovisi o dobrom planiranju.
words.exampleEn: The success of the project depends on good planning.

words.exampleArabic: يُشِيرُ التَّقْرِيرُ إِلَى ارْتِفَاعِ نِسْبَةِ الْبِطَالَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Izvještaj ukazuje na porast stope nezaposlenosti.
words.exampleEn: The report indicates a rise in the unemployment rate.

words.exampleArabic: مِنَ الْجَدِيرِ بِالذِّكْرِ أَنَّ هَذَا الْمَشْرُوعَ بَدَأَ قَبْلَ عَشْرِ سَنَوَاتٍ.
words.exampleBs: Vrijedno je napomenuti da je ovaj projekt počeo prije deset godina.
words.exampleEn: It is worth noting that this project started ten years ago.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَ مُسْتَوَى التَّعْلِيمِ فِي الْمَنَاطِقِ الرِّيفِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nivo obrazovanja u ruralnim područjima se povećao.
words.exampleEn: The level of education in rural areas has risen.

words.exampleArabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَتَعَامَلَ مَعَ الْوَاقِعِ كَمَا هُوَ.
words.exampleBs: Moramo se nositi sa stvarnošću kakva jeste.
words.exampleEn: We must deal with reality as it is.

words.exampleArabic: يُمَثِّلُ التَّعْلِيمُ مِحْوَرَ التَّنْمِيَةِ الْمُسْتَدَامَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Obrazovanje predstavlja žarište održivog razvoja.
words.exampleEn: Education represents the core of sustainable development.

words.exampleArabic: تَجَاوَزَتِ النَّتَائِجُ كُلَّ التَّوَقُّعَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Rezultati su premašili sva očekivanja.
words.exampleEn: The results exceeded all expectations.
